title: lepidagathis fasciculata var. fasciculata
intro: Lepidagathis fasciculata var. fasciculata is a plant species that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. It is also known as the "Indian lepidagathis" or "Lepidagathis fasciculata var. fasciculata" and is traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. Lepidagathis fasciculata var. fasciculata can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it is also used as a herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form.
